MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lorena Galo, In Propria Persona (415-244-9903) appears as self-represented claimant/judgment debtor

No other appearance is made in this matter

Court hears from judgment debtor. The Claim of Exemption of Lorena Galo is UPHELD. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR No. 9711, e-mail: lreding@sftc.org. (L&M302)

Ntc Of And Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted Req. For Attorney Fees Of And Filing Fee; Ntc Of Submitted

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted, Request For Attorney Fees Of And Filing Fee is Off Calendar. Motion is moot in light of default judgment entered on 11/04/2013 against defendant. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Paoli; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
